name: Complete Controller Philadelphia, PA - Bookkeeping Service
description_short: Complete Controller Philadelphia, PA - Bookkeeping Service is a credit repair provider based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Rated 5.0/5 with 11 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Complete Controller Philadelphia, PA - Bookkeeping Service is a credit repair provider serving clients in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Carrying a 5.0/5.0 Google rating from 11 reviews, Complete Controller Philadelphia, PA - Bookkeeping Service has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Philadelphia area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a insurance company, payroll service, software company, Complete Controller Philadelphia, PA - Bookkeeping Service provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Philadelphia, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Complete Controller Philadelphia, PA - Bookkeeping Service operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Philadelphia, Pennsylvania area who are considering Complete Controller Philadelphia, PA - Bookkeeping Service should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
